title: Capitol
description: Capitol is a land claim / block protections mod designed for high configurability.
body:
# Capitol

A claims & protections mod for Minecraft.

This is a [Create: Civilization](https://github.com/Create-Civilization/) project, focused around team & chunk claiming systems that have high compatibility with mods such as Create and Sable.

> **Current version:** `0.0.3-alpha`

## Features

- **Teams**
- **Chunk claiming**
- **Permissions**
- **JourneyMap integration**
- **Create compatibility**
- **Sable compatibility**

## Planned

- **Claim Entry Notifications**
- **In Game GUI**
- **Allies**
- **Wars**

## Status

- Capitol is currently undergoing heavy development in preparation for Create: Civilization Season 2.
    - This means stability is not currently a guarantee, and bugs or major breaking changes may occur as we work to improve Capitol.
    - If you find a bug, or have a feature suggestion/request, please [make a GitHub issue](https://github.com/Create-Civilization/Capitol/issues/new/)!
    - If stuff is broken or you don't like it, remember: [talk is cheap, send patches](https://x.com/FFmpeg/status/1762805900035686805/).

## Roadmap

- [x] Team creation & management
- [x] Chunk claiming & protection
- [x] Permissions system
- [x] JourneyMap claim overlay
- [ ] Alliance system
- [ ] War declaration & King-of-the-Hill takeover
- [ ] API for other mods to hook into Capitol

## Contributions

Contributions are _very_ welcomed (especially as Capitol is still heavily in development)!

If you have a feature you'd like to implement, or there's a bug you know how to fix, please [open a pull request](https://github.com/Create-Civilization/Capitol/pulls/)!

If you need to talk to the developers directly, you can [join our Discord server](https://discord.gg/3K3ydtmcZv)!

## Links

- [Create: Civilization GitHub](https://github.com/Create-Civilization/)
- [Create: Civilization Website](https://www.createcivilization.com/)
- [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/3K3ydtmcZv)
- [Issue Tracker](https://github.com/Create-Civilization/Capitol/issues)

## Credits
